title: How to build a continuous evaluation pipeline for multi-agent systems with Gemini
summary: Google Cloud Tech explains how to build automated continuous evaluation pipelines for multi-agent systems using Gemini and Cloud Run. The approach moves from manual testing to data-driven assessment with adaptive rubrics, shadow deployments, and CI/CD integration to detect regressions in production AI agent workflows.
